description: Product Description Our Butterfly Edition Perfume Is A Wonderful Present For Christmas, Valentine's Day, Anniversaries, Birthdays, And Other Special Occasions. Top Notes: Orange, Peach, Mandarian Middle Notes: Caramel, Jasmine, Orange Blossom. Base Notes: Cedarwood, Guaiac Wood, Sandalwood, Amber. IDEAL FOR GIFTS - Beautifully designed packaging and modern bottle. Ingrediants: Orange, Peach, Mandarian, Caramel, Jasmine, Orange Blossom, Cedarwood, Guaiac Wood, Sandalwood, Amber. SHOP WITH CONFIDENCE - We Are Proud Of The High Quality Of Our Items And Want You To Be Entirely Delighted With Your Purchase. Butterfly Edition Perfume Comes In 100 ml EDP (Eau de Toilette) For Women. Butterfly Edition Perfume 100ml, EdT Perfume, Butterfly Edition Eau De Toilette For Women Butterfly Edition Perfume Our Butterfly Edition Perfume Is A Wonderful Present For Christmas, Valentine's Day, Anniversaries, Birthdays, And Other Special Occasions. Butterfly Edition Perfume for Women Our Butterfly Edition Perfume has fragrance Notes of Orange, Peach, Mandarian, Caramel, Jasmine, Orange Blossom, Cedarwood, Guaiac Wood, Sandalwood, Amber. Butterfly Edition Perfume 100ml Butterfly Edition Perfume Comes In 100 ml EDP (Eau de Toilette) For Women. Fragrance Notes Top Notes The smell of mandarine Orange dominates the top notes in the gourmet floral and has a sweet smell. Heart Notes Jasmine is used as a natural sedative, much like lavender. Its sweet scent is known to help alleviate stress and anxiety Base Notes Amber is a blend of ingredients that describes a warm, powdery, sweet scent.
